concepts.title: semiconductor
concepts.quote: A semiconductor is a material whose electrical conductivity falls between that of a conductor and an insulator.

concepts.title: material
concepts.quote: A semiconductor is a material whose electrical conductivity falls between that of a conductor and an insulator.

concepts.title: Walter Brattain
concepts.quote: Walter Brattain and his colleagues at Bell Labs demonstrated the first transistor using a germanium crystal in 1947.
